design_philosophy: Precision Engineering & Technical Blueprint. A premium, objective, rigid, functional, and authoritative look suitable for a 20+ year industrial toolroom. Heavy use of 1px borders to expose the grid skeleton, generous padding, and monospaced typography for technical data.

mono.usage: Use for all numbers, statistics, specs, and small technical overlines.

layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (maximum 4px) to maintain the rigid industrial aesthetic.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: MODE B: 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID for Capabilities (border-collapse, 1px right/bottom borders), MODE A: 'TETRIS' GRID for Gallery (Asymmetrical layouts with varying col/row spans).

animations.hover: Slight scale-up on images, background color shift on surfaces. Buttons use solid color fill or right-arrow slide.
animations.scroll: Lenis momentum scrolling (Mandatory). Staggered fade-up for grid items using Framer Motion.

components_and_motion.surfaces: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. Containers should use border-collapse style layout where items share 1px borders (border-border).

products.description: Aluminum parts grid (Use for Hero image or main intro)

backgrounds_and_b_roll.description: High-precision milling machine cutting a metal piece
CNC milling machine working on metal

page_sections.name: Navigation
page_sections.instructions: Crystal Glass look (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) if sticky. Logo left, Links center, 'Get a Quote' button right. Use 1px bottom border.

page_sections.name: Hero Section
page_sections.instructions: White background with a subtle CSS grid pattern. Huge text (text-6xl+) in Cabinet Grotesk: 'Precision Engineering. Zero Compromise.' Monospaced sub-labels. Right side features the ALUMINIUM.jpg image inside a sharp-edged 1px border container.

page_sections.name: Stats Marquee
page_sections.instructions: Use react-fast-marquee. Technical monospaced typography (JetBrains Mono). '20+ YEARS EXPERIENCE', '400+ MOULDS DELIVERED', '150+ GLOBAL CLIENTS', 'ISO 9001:2015 CERTIFIED'. Divide items with a geometric symbol (e.g. + or //).

page_sections.name: Capabilities Grid
page_sections.instructions: 'Control Room' grid strategy. Use plain HTML/Tailwind to create a dense border-collapse style layout. Items: Die-casting Moulds, Plastic Injection Moulds, Jigs & Fixtures, PCBA/EMS Tooling, NPD. Hover state darkens background slightly (bg-slate-50).

page_sections.name: Product Gallery
page_sections.instructions: 'Tetris' Grid. Showcase the 4 uploaded DC images (DC1, DC2, DC3, DC4). Give the images a subtle background (bg-slate-100) since they are PNGs, ensuring they stand out. Images max-h-[80vh] for mobile.

page_sections.name: Industries Served
page_sections.instructions: Grid of badges using Phosphor Icons. Automotive, Aerospace, Power Grid, Telecom, EV, Defense. Minimalist icons + text in JetBrains Mono or Manrope.

page_sections.name: About Us
page_sections.instructions: Split layout. Left: Rich text about 20+ years of mastery. Right: The milling machine background image.

page_sections.name: Contact Section
page_sections.instructions: Industrial brutalist form using Shadcn components (customized with rounded-none). Dark background section (bg-slate-950) with white text, or keep it white with heavy black borders. Fields: Name, Email, Phone, Company, Message. Blue primary CTA.

page_sections.name: Footer
page_sections.instructions: Dark theme (bg-slate-950). Massive py-24 padding. Include addresses for Office and Factory. Large 'AEROTRON' watermark text in the background or at the bottom.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast minimums. Use blue primary for CTA and accents only.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='contact-form-submit').
